name: La Fonda Flan
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the sugar into a deep pan and place over heat. Stir constantly with a wooden spoon until the sugar melts and caramelizes to a golden brown color.
2. Remove from heat and pour into individual bowls or a large pan, coating the inside of each container.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs with evaporated milk, vanilla, nutmeg, cinnamon, and 1 tablespoon of sugar until well combined.
4. Carefully pour the egg mixture over the sugar-coated containers.
5. Place the flan in a large flat pan with an inch of water and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
6. Allow to cool before turning out onto a plate.
7. Before serving, add fresh whipped cream for garnish if desired.
Yields: 18 - 1/2 cup servings.
